name: turret-defender
description: Turret Defender – Addictive arcade shooter for Android

scripts.build: if not exist www mkdir www && copy /Y index.html www\index.html && copy /Y icon.png www\icon.png && copy /Y splash.png www\splash.png
scripts.sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.build-android: npm run sync && npx cap open android

author: AntiGravity
